user.title: Enter your Nutrislice district
user.description:
Enter your school district's Nutrislice subdomain. This is the part before `.nutrislice.com` in your school's menu URL.

For example, if your menu is at **jcps**.nutrislice.com, enter **jcps**.

data_description.district: The subdomain of your district's Nutrislice site (e.g. jcps, frsd, pleasantvalley).

school.title: Select your school
school.description: Choose your school and the Home Assistant calendar where menu events will be created.

data_description.school: Your school as listed in Nutrislice.
data_description.calendar_entity: The HA calendar entity that will receive a menu event for each school day. Create a Local Calendar named 'School Menu' if you don't have one.

error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to Nutrislice. Check the district slug and your internet connection.
error.no_schools_found: No schools found for that district slug. Double-check the subdomain.

abort.already_configured: A school is already configured. Remove the existing entry before adding a new one.

sync_menu.name: Sync menu
sync_menu.description: Fetches the latest breakfast and lunch menus from Nutrislice and writes them as events to the configured calendar.
